What do I do now?
💡
核心原则：不要卖产品，要卖诊断。WA 的工作只有一个——让他们来面诊。医生建立信任，CS 才 close。Core principle: Don't sell the product, sell the diagnosis. WA's only job — get them in. Doctor builds trust, CS closes.
对话流程Conversation Flow
从 Lead 进来到预约面诊成功From lead in to consultation booked
🎯
目标只有一个：预约面诊。不要在 WA 报价或介绍产品细节。One goal only: book the consultation. Don't quote prices or explain product details on WA.
🤖 Step 1 — Bot 开场（自动发）🤖 Step 1 — Bot Opening (auto-send)
Bot Opening
您好！我是 Estique 的 Natalie 👋

很多人来找我们之前，已经试过节食、运动、减重茶，甚至其他诊所——结果还是反弹，或者根本没效果 😔

我想先了解你一下，才能知道哪个方案最适合你。

你目前主要的困扰是什么？

A）已经试过很多方法，一直反弹
B）减了一些，但某几个部位怎么减都没用
C）根本减不下来，不知道从哪里开始
D）其他
Hi! I'm Natalie from Estique 👋

Many people who come to us have already tried dieting, exercise, slimming teas, even other clinics — but the weight keeps coming back, or nothing works at all 😔

I'd like to understand your situation first, so I can find the right plan for you.

What's your main concern right now?

A) Tried many things, always rebound
B) Lost some weight but certain areas just won't budge
C) Can't lose weight at all, don't know where to start
D) Other
👤 Step 2 — CS 接手：问诊断👤 Step 2 — CS takes over: diagnose
💡
不要急着介绍产品。先问问题——让 lead 说出自己的问题就是自我说服。Don't rush to introduce products. Ask questions first — when lead articulates their problem, they're selling themselves.
CS Diagnosis
了解了！[Name] 你分享一下 ☺️

你现在大概多重？
目标是想减多少公斤？
之前有试过什么方法吗？

这些我需要知道，才能帮你看看医生的方案适不适合你。
Got it! [Name] could you share a bit more ☺️

What's your current weight roughly?
How many kg are you hoping to lose?
Have you tried any methods before?

I need to know these so I can see if the doctor's plan is right for you.
👤 Step 3 — CS：发 Before & After + 分享减重原理👤 Step 3 — CS: Send Before & After + share how it works
💡
先发图，再发话术。真实效果 + 原理解释，lead 更容易相信。Send the photo first, then the script. Real results + explanation = much more convincing.
📱 78kg → 63kg · Lost 15kg in 4 months
Step 3 Script
[Name] 你说的这个情况，其实我们见过很多次 😔

这位客人在来我们这里之前，也是试过很多方法，一直没效果。
跟着我们的医生做了 4 个月，从 78kg 减到 63kg——减了 15kg。

她说的是："I feel lighter, healthier and more confident than ever. It's not just about weight loss, it's a new lifestyle."

她能做到，是因为有医生全程帮她分析代谢、调整食欲、配合仪器针对顽固脂肪。

你有没有兴趣来了解一下，医生会怎么帮你？ ☺️
[Name] honestly, what you're describing is something we hear very often 😔

This client also tried many methods before coming to us, with no results.
Under our doctor's program for 4 months, she went from 78kg to 63kg — losing 15kg.

In her own words: "I feel lighter, healthier and more confident than ever. It's not just about weight loss, it's a new lifestyle."

She achieved this because she had a doctor analysing her metabolism, adjusting her appetite, and combining targeted body treatments throughout.

Would you like to find out how the doctor can help you specifically? ☺️
👤 Step 4 — CS：预约面诊 CTA👤 Step 4 — CS: Book consultation CTA
Book Consult CTA
我帮你安排一个跟医生的免费身体评估 ☺️

医生会：
✅ 分析你的代谢状况
✅ 告诉你为什么之前的方法失败
✅ 设计你专属的减重方案

完全免费，来了不合适不用做。

你这周哪天方便过来？
📍 Segambut KL 还是 Taipan USJ 方便？
Let me arrange a free body assessment with the doctor for you ☺️

The doctor will:
✅ Analyse your metabolic condition
✅ Explain why past methods didn't work
✅ Design your personalised weight loss plan

Completely free. No obligation if it's not right for you.

Which day this week works?
📍 Segambut KL or Taipan USJ?
🏥 Step 5 — 面诊当天：CS Close 话术框架🏥 Step 5 — Day of consult: CS Close framework
📋
医生评估完之后，CS 接手 close。诊断结果 → 方案 → 今天决定的理由。After doctor assessment, CS takes over. Diagnosis → solution → reason to decide today.
Close Framework
医生刚才说，你的情况非常适合我们的计划 ☺️

根据你想减的目标，医生会为你设计一个专属方案。

我们的 3 个月计划有让很多客人减到目标体重——而且全程有医生监管，你不是一个人在减。

你今天决定的话，还能保留新客优惠价格 ☺️
The doctor just said your condition is a great fit for our program ☺️

Based on your target, the doctor will design a personalised plan specifically for you.

Our 3-month program has helped many clients reach their target weight — with a doctor monitoring throughout, you're not doing this alone.

If you decide today, you'll still lock in the new client price ☺️
📸
Before & After 建议：Step 3 之后发一张真实客户的 before/after 图，让 lead 看到真实效果，效果比话术更强。Before & After tip: After Step 3, send a real client before/after photo. Visual proof is stronger than any script.

📋
来了诊断完才拿出来。Trial 客每周来 → 第3周报价 → 第4周 close 上正装。Only reveal after consultation. Weekly visits → Week 3 present full package → Week 4 close.

推哪个？Which to recommend?
  • 目标 6-8kg → 推 Package A（3个月）Target 6-8kg → recommend Package A (3 months)
  • 目标 10kg 以上 → 先展示 Package B（6个月），再比较两个Target 10kg+ → show Package B (6 months) first, then compare
  • 说 No → 才拿出 Trial（RM2,999），绝对不要提前说Says No → offer Trial (RM2,999), never mention upfront
价格话术Price Scripts
处理价格问题 · 直接 copy 发出去Handle pricing · Copy and send directly
情况：问价格（还没来面诊）Situation: Asking price (before consultation)
Price Before Consult
好问题！我们有不同的计划，Trial 起步是 RM2,999，正装计划需要见了医生才能给你最准确的方案和价格 ☺️

因为每个人的情况不一样——医生会先了解你的目标和身体状况，才知道最适合你的是哪个计划。

来见医生是免费的，来了当场就知道你的方案和价格，不合适完全不用做。

要不要我帮你安排这周的免费评估？ ☺️
Great question! We have different plans, starting from RM2,999 for a trial. For the full program, the most accurate plan and price can only be determined after seeing the doctor ☺️

Every person's situation is different — the doctor first understands your goal and body, then recommends the plan that fits you best.

Seeing the doctor is free. You'll know your plan and price on the spot, zero obligation if it's not right.

Want me to book a free assessment for you this week? ☺️
情况：面诊后说"太贵了"Situation: "Too expensive" after consultation
Too Expensive Reframe
我理解 ☺️

你来之前试过哪些方法？大概花了多少？

（等 lead 回答）

其实很多客人算了之后才发现，之前试过的东西加起来已经比这个多了——而且那些没有结果，减了还会反弹。

这个有医生全程监管，你不是自己一个人在减。而且你是为一个真正的结果付费，不只是买疗程。
I understand ☺️

What have you tried before? How much did you spend roughly?

(Wait for answer)

Many clients realise after calculating that what they've spent before adds up to more — and those had no results, plus the weight came back.

This has a doctor throughout, so you're not doing it alone. And you're paying for a real outcome, not just sessions.
🚨
绝对不要给折扣。用价值来 reframe，不要用价格来竞争。Never give a discount. Reframe with value, not price competition.
情况："我要考虑一下"Situation: "Let me think about it"
Think About It
完全理解！考虑是对的 ☺️

不过我想先问你——今天最主要的顾虑是什么？
是价格？还是对效果不确定？还是时间不方便？

告诉我，我帮你解答 ☺️
Completely understand! It's good to think it through ☺️

But let me ask — what's your main concern today?
Is it the price? Uncertainty about results? Or timing?

Tell me and I'll help answer it ☺️
🔵 Trial 话术（只在 No 之后）🔵 Trial script (only after No)
Trial Offer
好的，我理解可能一下子不容易做这个决定 ☺️

我们有一个 1 个月的体验计划，让你先感受一下效果——RM2,999。

1 个月在医生的监管下，很多客人能减 4kg 左右，甚至更多，主要看你的身体反应。

做完第 3 周，医生会重新评估你的进度。如果你想继续，升上正装计划，新客优惠一样保留给你。

要不要先试试看？ ☺️
No worries, I understand it's not easy to decide right away ☺️

We have a 1-month experience plan to let you feel the results first — RM2,999.

In 1 month under doctor supervision, many clients lose around 4kg or more, depending on how your body responds.

After week 3, the doctor reassesses your progress. If you'd like to continue, you can upgrade to the full program and still keep the new client price.

Would you like to give it a try? ☺️
顾虑处理Objection Handling
常见顾虑 · 怎么回Common objections · How to respond
会不会有副作用？安不安全？Will there be side effects? Is it safe?
⚡ 不提产品名，讲身体的自然调整过程，转化为"医生全程监管"是优势。Don't name products. Talk about the natural adjustment process, reframe doctor monitoring as the advantage.
Script
好问题！任何让身体发生变化的方法，开始的时候都会有一个适应期 ☺️

常见的是刚开始食欲会减少，身体开始调整——这其实是好的迹象，代表身体在起反应。大部分客人 1-2 周就适应了，反而觉得轻松很多。

这也是为什么我们坚持要有医生全程跟着你——如果你有任何不适，医生会立刻帮你调整方案。

你不是自己摸索，是在医生的保驾护航下进行的 ☺️
Great question! Any approach that creates real change in the body will have an adjustment period ☺️

The most common experience early on is a natural decrease in appetite as the body starts adjusting — this is actually a good sign that things are working. Most clients adapt within 1-2 weeks and actually feel much lighter.

That's exactly why we have a doctor with you throughout — if you experience anything, the doctor adjusts your plan right away.

You're not figuring this out alone. You have a doctor looking after you every step ☺️
可以保证我一定会减肥到吗？Can you guarantee I will lose weight?
⚡ 不提具体数字或产品，保证的是"一定会减"这个方向，配合医生监管。Don't mention specific numbers or products. Guarantee the direction — "you will lose weight" — backed by doctor monitoring.
Script
我可以告诉你的是——只要你配合医生的方案，你一定会有减重的效果 ☺️

因为我们用的是医学上经过验证的方法，不是坊间的减重产品。医生会根据你的身体状况和反应，全程调整你的方案。

当然，效果的快慢和幅度因人而异——这也是为什么我们先做面诊，医生了解你的情况之后，才能给你最准确的预期 ☺️

（发 before/after 图）

这是我们客人的真实效果，给你参考。
What I can tell you is — as long as you follow the doctor's plan, you will see weight loss results ☺️

Because we use medically validated methods, not off-the-shelf slimming products. The doctor adjusts your plan throughout based on how your body responds.

Of course, how fast and how much varies from person to person — which is also why we start with a consultation. The doctor can give you the most accurate expectation after understanding your condition ☺️

(Send before/after photo)

These are real results from our clients, for your reference.
减完会不会反弹？Will the weight come back?
⚡ 诚实 + 强调医生帮建立长期习惯。Be honest + emphasise doctor helps build long-term habits.
Script
坦白说——任何减重方法，如果做完之后完全回到原来的生活方式，都有可能反弹 ☺️

但我们跟一般减重不同的地方是：整个计划里，医生会帮你建立新的饮食习惯和对食欲的认知。很多客人做完之后，本来很难控制的食欲自然就改善了。

身体的习惯改了，才是真正不反弹的原因。
Honestly — any weight loss method can rebound if you go straight back to old habits after ☺️

But what makes us different is: throughout the program, the doctor helps you build new eating habits and a healthier relationship with appetite. Many clients find their appetite naturally improves after going through the program.

When your body's habits change, that's what truly prevents rebound.
我要先问我老公/家人I need to ask my husband / family first
⚡ 不要催，了解背后真实顾虑。Don't push, uncover the real underlying concern.
Script
完全理解！这么重要的决定，当然要跟家人商量 ☺️

我可以准备一个简单的资料给你，方便你跟他们解释这个计划吗？

另外想问一下——你自己对这个计划有没有什么顾虑？有时候了解了清楚，讨论起来会更容易 ☺️
Completely understand! Such an important decision should definitely involve your family ☺️

Can I prepare some simple information for you to explain the plan to them?

Also, just curious — do you personally have any concerns? Sometimes when things are clearer, the conversation becomes easier ☺️

教育型 · 为什么减肥一直失败Education · Why weight loss always fails
FU2 Education
分享一个很多人不知道的事 👇

你有没有想过，为什么有些人节食运动很努力，还是减不下来？

原因通常是：代谢率低 + 食欲没有被正确调整——靠意志力很难持续。

这就是为什么需要医生介入。医生帮你分析身体的真正问题，用医学方法从根源调整，不是靠意志力硬撑。

很多客人到了第 2-3 周就感觉不一样了——食欲自然少了，身体轻了。

要来见一下医生吗？免费，不合适不用做 ☺️
Here's something many people don't know 👇

Have you wondered why some people diet and exercise hard, yet still can't lose weight?

The reason is usually: low metabolic rate + appetite that's never been properly addressed — willpower alone is very hard to sustain.

That's why a doctor's involvement matters. The doctor analyses what's actually happening in your body and adjusts from the root — not by forcing willpower.

Many clients notice a difference by week 2-3 — appetite naturally decreases, body feels lighter.

Want to come see the doctor? Free, zero obligation ☺️
FU3 · +7天 人工 10-11am

CS 规则CS Rules
减重计划专属规则 · 必读Weight program specific rules · Must read
🚨 绝对禁止🚨 Absolutely forbidden
❌
提任何产品名字（Mounjaro、HIFU、RF 等）Naming any products (Mounjaro, HIFU, RF etc.)
说"医疗方法"、"仪器疗程"、"医生监管的方案"就够了。产品名留给医生在诊所说。Say "medical approach", "body treatment sessions", "doctor-monitored plan". Leave product names for the doctor in clinic.
❌
承诺具体减重数字Promising specific weight loss numbers
只能说"很多客人在 1 个月内感觉明显变化"。不能说"你一定减 X kg"。Only say "many clients feel noticeable changes within 1 month." Never say "you will definitely lose X kg."
❌
提 Trial 在 close Package A/B 之前Mentioning Trial before attempting to close A/B
Trial 是最后备用，只在 A 和 B 都被拒绝之后才拿出来。Trial is last resort. Only offer after both A and B are declined.
❌
给折扣Giving discounts
新客价已经是优惠价。如果还嫌贵，用价值 reframe，不要给折扣。New client price is already promotional. Reframe with value, never give a discount.
❌
在 WA 上 close 价格Closing on price over WA
WA 的工作只有一个：预约面诊。价格 close 在诊所发生。WA has one job: book the consultation. Price closing happens in-clinic.
✅ 必须做到✅ Must do
✅
每条消息以问句结尾Every message ends with a question
你来主导对话。没有问句 = 没有方向 = 对话停止。You lead the conversation. No question = no direction = conversation dies.
✅
强调"医生全程"而不是产品Emphasise "doctor throughout" not products
客户买的是"有医生帮我管减重"这个结果，不是买产品。Clients are buying "a doctor managing my weight loss" — the outcome, not the product.
✅
Before & After 是最强的 social proof，多用Before & After is the strongest social proof — use often
FU1、FU3、顾虑处理都用 before/after 图。真实效果比任何话术都有力。Use before/after in FU1, FU3, and objection handling. Real results are stronger than any script.
✅
有不合适的客户，转介医生Flag unsuitable clients to the doctor
孕妇、糖尿病、心脏病——CS 不决定适不适合，由医生评估。Pregnant, diabetic, heart conditions — CS doesn't decide suitability, doctor assesses.
